title: Upgrade network to v8.1.0
summary:
If passed, this proposal will upgrade the blockchain to version 8.1.0. # v8.1.0 Upgrade Summary

This upgrade removes the `crisis` module, updates dependencies, improves fee handling, and introduces bounded EndBlock queue processing in several modules for better safety and performance.

## Module Highlights

- **Burner**: moved burning and raffle cleanup to bounded EndBlock processing, improved IBC burn/liquidity handling, and tightened raffle protections.
- **Epochs**: added safer epoch lookup with proper error handling.
- **CoinTrunk**: improved validation and fixed article ID pointer update behavior.
- **Rewards**: moved reward processing to bounded EndBlock queues, added anti-spam gas protection, and fixed multiple reward accounting issues.
- **TokenFactory**: tightened subdenom validation and routed creation fees through the fee collection flow.
- **TradeBin**: introduced governance-tunable queue/gas parameters, improved order queue safety, migrated fee params to `sdk.Coin`, and enhanced liquidity and validation checks.
- **TxFeeCollector**: added governance-controlled minimum gas fee and balance iteration limits, and moved fee conversion to EndBlock with split distribution.

## Full Release Notes

Full release notes: https://github.com/bze-alphateam/bze/releases/tag/v8.1.0
